journey.label: Journey (Interaction)
journey.description: Common dependencies and decisions when authoring or retrieving journeys with mcdev. Refine by activity types in your design.

questions.prompt: What journey shape are you targeting (e.g. multi-step, single send / quick send, API-triggered)? This drives which activities and event assets apply.
Which journey folder (category) should hold the definition? mcdev maps folder-journey; ensure the folder exists or retrieve it first.
For email activities: which sender profile, send classification, and transactional or classic email/asset-message assets are required? List their keys or retrieve them from the BU.
Which Data Extensions feed entry events, update contact, or exclusions? Confirm keys and that they are deployed before the journey.
For multi-step or API entry: which event definition is used? Retrieve `event` metadata and align keys with the journey entry configuration.
If SMS or push activities are included: which mobileKeyword, mobileCode, mobileMessage, or mobileApplication assets apply?

notes: Retrieve or deploy dependencies in an order that respects your BU: folders and shared assets before the journey JSON.
Use `mcdev explainTypes` and the wiki page on metadata-specific settings for journey edge cases.

automation.label: Automation

questions.prompt: Which step types are used (SQL, script, journey entry, send email, etc.)? Each implies different linked metadata.
What schedule or trigger should mcdev document on retrieve (cron vs manual)?

notes: Validate automation JSON after templating if you use markets with suffixes.
